utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: A new place for a new Ross . I am gonna have you and all the guys from work over once it is you know , furnished .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Ledbetter
utterances.text: I must say it is nice to see you back on your feet .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Well I am that . And that whole rage thing is definitely behind me .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Ledbetter
utterances.text: I wonder if its time for you to rejoin our team at the museum ?
